name: Evaluating ER-100 for Safety in People With Glaucoma or Non-Arteritic Anterior Ischemic Optic Neuropathy
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov registry for a recruiting Life Biosciences phase 1 single-dose ER-100 study in open-angle glaucoma and non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy. The registry describes an intravitreal AAV OSK epigenetic therapy activated by systemic doxycycline, with primary safety and tolerability endpoints and no posted results in the June 12, 2026 API view.
